cards.back: A project management approach that emphasizes flexibility, collaboration, and iterative progress toward well-defined goals
A project management approach that involves breaking down the project into distinct phases, each with specific objectives and deliverables
A hierarchical decomposition of the project into smaller, manageable tasks and activities
A type of bar chart used to display a project schedule, showing the start and end dates of each task and the dependencies between them
A project management technique used to identify the critical tasks that determine the minimum time required to complete a project
